raw_text:
ERROR   [TC-J-001] interface.f90:5 <-> header.h:2  param[0] 'm'
  ILP64_MISMATCH: Fortran INTEGER(c_int64_t) = 8 bytes.
  C 'int' = 4 bytes. For m ≤ 2^31-1, upper 32 bits are zero (correct).
  For m > 2^31-1, Fortran passes 8 bytes; C reads 4 bytes (overflow truncated).
  Silent wrong result or out-of-bounds access for large matrices.

ERROR   [TC-J-001] (same for n, lda, every element of ipiv, info)

NOTE: Use int64_t or MKL_INT64 in C for ILP64-compiled Fortran libraries.
      Symbol suffix convention: _ilp64 or _64 indicates ILP64 variant.
